# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this project, please report it responsibly.

**Please do NOT open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Instead, please use [GitHub's private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/Global-Security-Community/wiki/security/advisories/new) to report the issue.

You should receive a response within 48 hours. We will work with you to understand the issue and address it promptly.

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| latest  | :white_check_mark: |
